title: Workform Updates no longer assigning people
excerpt:
Hi 
I’ve been using a workform for time tracking. Up until now the person filling in the form has been auto assigned to the person column, but that appears to have stopped. Does anyone identify the update that has caused…

posts.author: RoryMegginson (Rory )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
I’ve been using a workform for time tracking. Up until now the person filling in the form has been auto assigned to the person column, but that appears to have stopped. Does anyone identify the update that has caused this ?

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Rory,
Till this issue is resolved I would suggest to create an automation i.e “When an item is created assign creator as person” to achieve the same desired result of the “auto assignment”

posts.author: MistyMK (AppBay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @RoryMegginson @Fario_Consulting there is a new app called Smart Timer and Team Tracking, same look and feel as the native timer, but with more features and reporting.

This app automatically assigns the users name to the clock. Multiple people can record time on the same item simultaneously and you can see live what your team are clocked onto.

Hope that helps!
